summary: End-to-end backend and frontend testing of Event Vendor Marketplace MVP. All 19 backend pytest cases pass covering vendor/customer registration, login, profile, vendor search by city + coordinates, vendor lookup, duplicate-email handling, auth header validation, and uploaded-image retrieval via /api/files. Frontend: home page renders, signup form for customer works and navigates to /dashboard, but Dashboard page is stuck on a 'Loading...' state - dashboard-container testid never becomes visible after successful signup/login.

minor.issue: Returns 422 (FastAPI Header(...) required) instead of 401 in unauthenticated case. Functional but inconsistent.

ui_bugs.issue: After successful customer signup + redirect to /dashboard, page remains stuck on 'Loading...' indefinitely. data-testid='dashboard-container' is never rendered. Backend /api/user/profile works correctly with the token via direct API tests, so the frontend is likely sending the request without/with wrong Authorization header or not handling the response/error state. No console errors captured (page emits no error logs).

integration_issues.issue: Token is stored in localStorage and navigation occurs, but Dashboard never renders content (perpetual Loading). Suggests Dashboard.jsx fetch to /api/user/profile is failing silently or not reading the token correctly.

action_items: Investigate Dashboard.jsx - verify it reads localStorage 'token' and sets Authorization: Bearer <token> header when calling /api/user/profile. Add error-state UI so failures are visible instead of perpetual 'Loading...'.
Verify Dashboard's loading -> success/error state transition; currently UI gives no feedback on profile fetch failure.
Vendor signup flow on UI was not fully verified due to dependent failure (dashboard never loads after signup) - re-test after Dashboard fix.
Verify VendorProfile page integration and Home search -> click vendor card flow after Dashboard fix (search returns vendors via API correctly per backend tests).
Optionally normalize /api/user/profile response to 401 (instead of 422) when Authorization header is missing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py get_profile uses Header(...) (required) but get_current_user expects Header(None) - inconsistent; missing auth returns 422 instead of 401.
Storage init is a sync requests call inside async handlers - blocks event loop. Acceptable for MVP but should be moved to httpx async or a thread executor for scale.
No rate limiting or password strength validation on register endpoints.
JWT_SECRET defaults to placeholder 'your-secret-key-change-in-production' if env var missing - acceptable for dev but flag for prod.
Dashboard.jsx (frontend) has no visible error handling - perpetual Loading state hides integration failures.
test_credentials: Created during test run: TEST_vendor_<uuid>@test.com / TestPass123! and TEST_customer_<uuid>@test.com / TestPass123! (cleanup not performed - prefixed TEST_ for easy identification). UI: TEST_uicust_<ts>@test.com used.
seed_data_creation: Test vendor and customer accounts (TEST_ prefix) seeded via API during pytest run. Vendor uploaded a small fake PNG to object storage successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid (19/19). Focus next testing on frontend Dashboard fix: after main agent fixes Dashboard.jsx to send Bearer token and handle error states, re-run UI flow: signup -> dashboard renders profile, then re-test vendor signup (needs file upload via input[type=file]), Home search -> vendor card click -> VendorProfile page, and protected-route redirect when not logged in. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py are stable and can be re-run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml
rca of the issue: Dashboard stuck on 'Loading...' - likely root cause: Dashboard.jsx is calling GET /api/user/profile without proper Authorization header (or without setting axios default header from localStorage token), so the backend returns 401/422 and the frontend's loading state isn't updated to error. Reproduction: 1) Visit /signup, sign up as customer with valid data, 2) Auto-redirected to /dashboard, 3) Page shows 'Loading...' indefinitely. Mitigation: Ensure Dashboard.jsx reads token from localStorage and sends it via axios headers; add error state handling to surface failures.
